title: FPerk
body:
FPerk is a 100% gui perk plugin. There is only one command. All gui are 100% configurable.

[Wiki](https://github.com/Florianpal1/FPerk/wiki) | [Github](https://github.com/Florianpal1/FPerk) | [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/dEvR34ZzYQ)


Support :
- https://discord.com/invite/dEvR34ZzYQ
- Discord code : dEvR34ZzYQ

Features :
- Full language customization
- Used Aikar Commands
- Fully Customisable Gui
- Customisable perk and skill
- Permission per Perk
- Perk with timing
- Pre configured Perk (Fly, Heal, Night Vision, Glowing, Keep Inventory, Keep Experience and more)

Dependency :
- Java 16
- Vault
- SQL Server (for sync between two server) or SQLite
- LuckPerms

Installation :
- Put the jar file in plugins of all server
- Configure the database.yml for MySQL (on same database for all server, if you have one server SQLite is enough) more information here

![BStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/FPerk.svg)
